summary: Mixed week. 2 of 3 sessions completed. Pain during exercise averaged 4.6/10 — above the target threshold. Next-morning stiffness elevated on 3 days. One missed session due to pain flare.
whatNeedsAttention: Pain during exercise exceeding 4/10 on multiple occasions
Next-morning stiffness above 4/10 on 3 of 7 days
Reported pain flare after Day 3 session — may have pushed too hard
Confidence score declining over the week
nextWeekChanges: Hold at current phase — do not progress exercises
Reduce hamstring curl to 3 sets with a lighter load
Return to run-walk 2 minutes / 2 minutes (previous protocol)
Add one extra rest day between sessions if pain remains elevated
reasoning: Pain scores exceeded the acceptable threshold on multiple sessions and next-morning stiffness was elevated, suggesting the current load is slightly too high for where the tendon is right now. Holding and slightly reducing load for one week before re-assessing is the conservative and clinically appropriate decision.
